subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1920-01-05
subcodes.first_line: The Blessed Beauty has freed us from all restraints. He teaches that we must be kind to all, even to our enemies.  There was a certain Mustafa Bayk
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمال مبارک ما را از جمیع قیود نجات داده... شخصی بود مصطفی بیک مدیر تحریرات مفتی شهر عکا
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @station of the Manifestation of God, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love
